title: Frivaldia volubilis
taxonomy: Frivaldia volubilis is a genus of flowering plants in the family Bignoniaceae. This family includes over 800 species of woody vines and shrubs, commonly known as bignonia or trumpet creeper. The plants in this family are primarily native to the tropical and subtropical regions of the Americas and Asia. The classification of Frivaldia volubilis places it within the order Lamiales, which includes many flowering plants with bilaterally symmetrical flowers. The family Bignoniaceae is also known for its complex and highly modified flowers.
